file_insights.purpose: Builds task objects from card metadata for vibekanban provider integration
key_structures: Two separate card processing paths with identical field additions (~lines 61 and 91)
file_insights.size_impact: Minor - 25 lines added (1 import + 1 helper function + 5 fields × 2 locations)

patterns_discovered.pattern: DRY violation - task dict field additions duplicated
patterns_discovered.location: Two separate loops (different card state branches)
patterns_discovered.impact: Maintenance risk if field schema changes - must update in 2+ places

patterns_discovered.pattern: ISO-8601 timestamp parsing with timezone edge case handling
patterns_discovered.indicates: Dealing with mixed ISO formats (Zulu vs +00:00)

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: provider field implementation mismatch with spec
Import of datetime/time inside function scope
gotchas_discovered.issue: Imports executed on every meta object processed; creates module dependency surprise

gotchas_discovered.reason: Python 3.7+ fromisoformat() doesn't accept 'Z' suffix natively

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: elapsed_s can be None for cards without duration_s or started_at
gotchas_discovered.impact: Downstream consumers (vibekanban UI) must handle None values

approach_outcome.partial_details: provider field implemented as basic meta.get() rather than spec'd provider_chain logic
approach_outcome.deliverables: All 5 fields (priority, provider, elapsed_s, progress, ac_spec_id) added to task objects in both card processing paths

recommendations.recommendation: Verify and fix provider field implementation to match spec (provider_chain logic with fallback)
Extract duplicated task dict creation (5-field additions in 2 locations) into shared helper function to eliminate DRY violation
Move datetime/time imports to module level; avoid importing inside functions
Add optional debug logging when elapsed_s computation fails (datetime parsing exceptions)
Document that elapsed_s may be None for cards without duration_s or started_at timestamp
